sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَحْمَدُ لُغَةَ الْبَرْمَجَةِ فِي الْمَدْرَسَةِ الصَّيْفِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je naučio programski jezik u ljetnoj školi.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed learned a programming language in summer school.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ مَجْمُوعَةً مِنَ الْأَوَامِرِ لِصِنَاعَةِ مَوْقِعٍ بَسِيطٍ.
sentences.translation: Napisao je skup naredbi kako bi napravio jednostavnu web stranicu.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote a set of commands to create a simple website.

sentences.arabic: يَرَى الْكَثِيرُونَ أَنَّ الْبَرْمَجَةَ هِيَ لُغَةُ الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi smatraju da je programiranje jezik budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Many see programming as the language of the future.
